title: chrysodium heterocliton
intro: Chrysodium heterocliton, also known as the 'Mountain Spleenwort', is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia, where it grows in shaded and moist areas. The medicinal properties of Chrysodium heterocliton include its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to promote digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems.
